# [Clang] Crash: "Dependent types cannot show up in debug information" in `CGDebugInfo.cpp` with array aliases in templates

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/174979

## Body

***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang trunk crashed and goes back to 5.0.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/K1jGnsxv6

## Program
```cpp
#include <iostream>

template <int &T> void FuncTemplate() {
  std::cout << T << std::endl;
}

template <typename T> class Container {
  T *data;
  size_t size;

public:
  Container(size_t n) : size(n), data(new T[n]) {
    static int InternalVar = 43;
    FuncTemplate<InternalVar>();
  }
};

using ElementAlias = float[4];

int main() { 
    Container<ElementAlias> top_container(1);
 }
```

## Program
```cpp
#include &lt;iostream&gt;

template &lt;int &amp;T&gt; void FuncTemplate() {
  std::cout &lt;&lt; T &lt;&lt; std::endl;
}

template &lt;typename T&gt; class Container {
  T *data;
  size_t size;

public:
  Container(size_t n) : size(n), data(new T[n]) {
    static int InternalVar = 43;
    FuncTemplate&lt;InternalVar&gt;();
  }
};

using ElementAlias = float[4];

int main() { 
    Container&lt;ElementAlias&gt; top_container(1);
 }
```
